# ipforge_vlan (Resource)



## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "ipforge_vlan" "lab" {
  vlan_id     = 120
  name        = "lab"
  description = "Lab VLAN managed by Terraform"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String)
- `vlan_id` (Number)

### Optional

- `description` (String)
- `notes` (String)

### Read-Only

- `id` (Number) The ID of this resource.
